text: A graph G=(V,E) models networks. BFS (queue) finds shortest paths in unweighted graphs. DFS (stack/recursion) detects cycles, performs topological sort on DAGs. Both are O(V+E).
A graph G=(V,E) models networks. BFS (queue) finds shortest paths in unweighted graphs. DFS (stack/recursion) detects cycles, performs topological sort on DAGs. Both are O(V+E).
